description_long: This house features a modern, multi-story design with a combination of wood-textured and dark panel exteriors. The main structure is rectangular with a prominent sloped gable roof, while an attached side section has a lower, red-tiled roof. Large, horizontal windows dominate the facade, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property is surrounded by a patterned ground surface, including green lawn-like areas and a blue rectangular pool or water feature. The overall layout suggests a spacious, upscale residence with distinct geometric landscaping.
description: A modern, multi-story house with wood and dark panel exteriors, large horizontal windows, and a sloped gable roof, set within a patterned landscape featuring green lawns and a blue pool.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sloped gable roof, attached side section with a red-tiled roof, and a clear view of the pool and green lawn areas.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main facade with large horizontal windows, the main entryway, and the striped green lawn.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the sloped roof, extensive window coverage, and the pool area on the right.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the house, the flat expanse of the roof, and the geometric landscaping patterns.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no visible porch, and a small overhang, integrated into the facade.
